Legal

Terms & Conditions

The basic agreement between you and K-LINE MEN when you shop with us.

Last updated: 7 May 2026

1. About these terms

These are the terms that apply when you browse klinemen.ug or place an order with K-LINE MEN. By using the site or placing an order, you agree to them.

2. Who we are

K-LINE Design Ltd, trading as K-LINE MEN, is a menswear retailer based at Fraine Building, Ntinda, Kampala, Uganda. WhatsApp +256 777 466 979 · email klinedesignltd@gmail.com.

3. Products and pricing

All prices on the site are in Ugandan Shillings (UGX) and inclusive of any applicable taxes. We try hard to keep product photos, colours, sizing, and prices accurate, but small differences between what you see on screen and what arrives can occur.

Prices and availability can change. The price you pay is the price confirmed on WhatsApp at the time of order, plus any agreed delivery fee. If a price on the site is obviously wrong (a typo or system glitch), we will let you know before processing the order — you can choose to continue at the corrected price or cancel without charge.

4. Placing an order

You place an order by sending us your bag on WhatsApp (via the "Checkout on WhatsApp" button or the floating chat icon) or by messaging us directly with the items you'd like. An order is only confirmed once we acknowledge it on WhatsApp with availability, sizes, and the total — including delivery if any.

We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order, for example if a product is out of stock or the delivery location is not serviceable. In that case any payment you have made is refunded promptly.

5. Payment

We accept Mobile Money (MTN, Airtel), bank transfer, card payment via trusted local partners, and cash on delivery within Kampala. Payment instructions are confirmed on WhatsApp once your order is acknowledged. Goods remain ours until paid for in full.

6. Delivery

Within Kampala we aim to deliver same-day or next-day where possible. Outside Kampala we deliver via partner couriers, typically 1–3 working days. Delivery fees depend on your location and are quoted on WhatsApp before dispatch.

Risk in the goods passes to you on delivery. We are not responsible for delays caused by events outside our reasonable control (weather, traffic, courier strikes, public holidays).

7. Returns and exchanges

If the size or fit isn't right, you can exchange most items within 7 days as long as they are unworn with tags attached. Final sale on accessories (belts, ties, watches, wallets, sunglasses, fragrances). For full details, see our FAQs.

If your order arrives damaged or incorrect, message us a photo on WhatsApp within 24 hours of delivery and we will replace the item at our cost.

8. Use of the site

You may use this site to browse our catalog, save items to your bag or wishlist, and contact us. You agree not to use the site to do anything unlawful, to attempt to disrupt it, or to scrape it for commercial purposes without our written permission.

9. Intellectual property

The K-LINE MEN brand, logo, and product photography are owned by us and may not be used without written permission. Product names and descriptions are written by us and may be reused on third-party platforms only with permission.

10. Limitation of liability

Nothing in these terms limits our liability where it cannot lawfully be limited (for example, for death or injury caused by negligence). Beyond that, our total liability to you for any claim arising out of an order is limited to the amount you paid for that order.

We are not liable for indirect or consequential losses (loss of profit, lost time, etc.).

11. Privacy

How we handle your information is set out in our Privacy Policy.

12. Changes to these terms

We may update these terms when our practices change or to keep up with the law. The "Last updated" date at the top will reflect the most recent change. Material changes will be flagged on the site.

13. Governing law and disputes

These terms and any dispute arising from them are governed by the laws of Uganda. Any dispute we cannot resolve on WhatsApp or by email will be referred to the courts of Uganda.

14. Contact

Need clarification? Message us on WhatsApp at +256 777 466 979, email klinedesignltd@gmail.com, or visit us at Fraine Building, Ntinda, Kampala — Mon–Sat, 9am–7pm.
